Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Wells, for and with petitioner Wanda Thompson; Virginia George, for and with objector Melvin Thompson; Robert Earl Thompson.

The Court inquired regarding the date of death of Edgar Thompson. Melvin Thompson replied that Edgar had died in Vietnam in August or September, 1967, leaving no known children.
Virginia George and Robert Wells both confirm that all parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 20, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 27, 2018. The matter was continued and the Parties are to return on March 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not reported)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Thompson for Wanda Thompson (Petitioner).
Melvin Thompson in Propria Persona.

This was a pregranted matter. Mr. Thompson stated that he is objecting, that he needs time to obtain an Attorney and that two other siblings are objecting/joining. The First and Final Report and Account, etc. is continued to December 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Written objection is to be filed no later than December 5, 2017. The Court informed Mr. Thompson that if nothing is filed, the Court will assume the objection is withdrawn.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
